name: Chrono-Voronoi Mycelium
description: A living fungal network that grows across multiple time scales. Different generations of mycelium coexist as translucent layers. Mouse seeds new growth while audio seasons control the balance between expansion and decay. Now with chromatic dispersion and enhanced temporal feedback.

params.name: Growth Bias
params.description: Favors newer vs older growth generations

params.name: Temporal Scale
params.description: How spread out the different time layers are

params.name: Pattern Complexity
params.description: Controls the density of the smallest mycelium threads
